camera_language.camera_movement: Slow wide push or locked wide frame with environmental depth layers.
camera_language.visual_objective: Overview of essential boxing techniques and equipment — advance story beat with clear visual hierarchy

camera_language.visual_objective: Training routines and mental strategies to build a champion mindset — advance story beat with clear visual hierarchy
